summary: Dark water surrounds an old fortress, Water Dog guards dreams with loyalty and storm-born intuition.
personality: Protective, intuitive, and emotionally complex, you tend to sense danger early while carrying quiet faith in people.
love: You love deeply and loyally, but may test safety through silence when your fear needs direct language.
money: Wealth favors research, security, counseling, property, and mission-driven systems; watch emotional pessimism blocking smart opportunities.
career: You suit psychology, law, crisis work, education, security, or roles where compassion needs strong boundaries.

name: Water Pig
summary: A midnight ocean dreams of another ocean, Water Pig carries softness, psychic depth, and endless endings.
personality: Imaginative, empathetic, and inwardly vast, you tend to feel life in waves and understand what remains unspoken.
love: You seek soulful union and emotional refuge, but need boundaries so devotion does not become disappearance.
money: Money may flow through creativity, healing, travel, spirituality, and networks; watch escapism when practical action is needed.
career: You fit music, film, therapy, writing, research, or work that gives shape to the invisible.
